socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. socketedItems.secDescrText: Wave your wand to create a hovering kinetic projectile. After a short duration, the projectile is fired at an enemy, dealing area damage on impact and chaining to further targets. Using this attack again will reset the duration for all hovering projectiles. Multiple projectiles fired in sequence will attempt to target different enemies. Cannot be directly used by traps or mines.
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attack Damage from this Skill at 150% of their value
Projectiles deal 12% more Damage per previous Projectile fired in sequence

name: Warped Timepiece
flavourText: As you have lived, so you shall die
forever trying to keep up with me.
Your blood on these hands of mine
forever makes me the public enemy.
